pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take: **Ghost Pepper's puttin' The Backpass Assassin on notice — USA ain't playin' no games in Cali.** Turkey looks shaky on defense, and Devin's hopes are ridin' high with USA showin' solid form. Meanwhile, Gayden's roster lookin' like he's draftin' teams based on a FIFA video game cover from 2010. The Backpass Assassin best hope those Turkish defenders don't backpass us any gifts today. I'm callin' it now: USA's takin' this one in style with a big statement, all while Ghost Pepper enjoys his throne at the top of the league.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy's Brazil Secures Easy Win Over Rafe's Scotland
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach credits a tactical masterpiece while Rafe blames jet lag.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin's Losing Streak Continues As Korea Falls To South Africa
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden still hopeful, citing 'more games to backpass in'.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper's South Africa Spices Things Up With Win Over Korea
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin relaxes on top while Gayden reflects on strategy.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper Set For Showdown With Backpass Assassin's Turkey
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin aims to burn through Gayden's hopes under California lights.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner got punked by a teenager, dropping two spots after Rafe joined the league.
Rafe's draft debut was a dumpster fire, yet somehow, the kid's still in it.
Devin can't handle the heat — Rafe has smoked him twice already.
Model predicted Rafe would be a joke; the kid's flipping the script.
